rulings.Case Title: LYNN SCHROEDER ET AL VS. MARY LOU FINK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 4, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT JOHN LUKRICH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to December 2, 2015. rulings.Case Title: MAXIMUS-BP 1979 MISSION STREET LLC, A DELAWARE LIM VS. ELAINE C. JANG
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 4, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF MAXIMUS-BP 1979 MISSION STREET LLC, A DELAWARE LIM DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part SUSTAINED in part. Demurrer to the second, fifth and sixteenth affirmative defenses is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND; amended answer to be filed within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff's demurrer to the answer's sixth affirmative defense is OVERRULED, as a party may plead in the alternative. = (501/RBU)
